title: Modern Hollywood Hills Villa
description: Stunning mid-century modern villa nestled in the Hollywood Hills with panoramic city views. Features an open floor plan, chef's kitchen, infinity pool, and multiple outdoor entertaining areas. Perfect for film shoots, photo sessions, and exclusive events.

title: Silver Lake Warehouse Studio
description: Industrial chic warehouse converted into a fully-equipped creative studio. 6,000 sqft of open space with 20ft ceilings, polished concrete floors, exposed brick, and professional lighting grid. Ideal for commercial shoots and music videos.

title: Venice Beach Craftsman Bungalow
description: Charming 1920s craftsman bungalow two blocks from the beach. Original hardwood floors, vintage fixtures, and a lush backyard garden. Great for lifestyle campaigns, editorial shoots, and intimate gatherings.

title: Downtown LA Penthouse Loft
description: Sophisticated penthouse loft on the 32nd floor with floor-to-ceiling windows and unobstructed skyline views. Features a wraparound terrace, open kitchen, and luxury finishes throughout. Perfect for high-end fashion shoots and corporate events.
